zh.Strensham, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆
zh.Kingston Russell, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Rohese de Bardolf於大約1180年出生在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素時，她的父親Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell40歲，母親Alicia Corbet25歲。她於從1201年1月8日到1202年1月7日與Sir John Russell在英國多瑟特金斯頓 羅素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年6月18日在英國武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆享年67歲。

zh-hans.Strensham, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆
zh-hans.Kingston Russell, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Rohese de Bardolf于大约1180年出生在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素时，她的父亲Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell40岁，母亲Alicia Corbet25岁。她于从1201年1月8日到1202年1月7日与Sir John Russell在英国多瑟特金斯頓 羅素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年6月18日在英国武斯特斯爾斯特倫善姆享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohese
meanings: An old British name. It is found Latinised Rhesus, and is probably derived from the Greek word for Mars, the god of war.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Rohese de Bardolf was born about 1180, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, her father, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, was 40 and her mother, Alicia Corbet, was 25. She married Sir John Russell from 8 January 1201 to 7 January 1202, in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 June 1246, in Strensham, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Rohese de Bardolf est née environ 1180, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alicia Corbet, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Russell du 8 janvier 1201 au 7 janvier 1202, à Kingston Russell, Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 juin 1246, à Strensham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Rohese de Bardolf um 1180 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell 40 und ihre Mutter Alicia Corbet 25. Sie hat von 8. Januar 1201 bis 7. Januar 1202 in Kingston Russell, Dorset, England Sir John Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Juni 1246 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Strensham, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Rohese de Bardolf è nata il circa 1180 nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England, sua padre, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Alicia Corbet, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Russell da 8 gennaio 1201 a 7 gennaio 1202, nel Kingston Russell, Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 giugno 1246, nel Strensham, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Rohese de Bardolfが約1180年にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルで生まれた時，父Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewellは40歳，母Alicia Corbetは25歳であった。から1201年1月8日まで1202年1月7日にイギリスドールセトキングストン ルセルでSir John Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年6月18日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアストレンシャムで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Rohese de Bardolf(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alicia Corbet(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1201년 1월 8일부터 1202년 1월 7일까지 영국 도르세트 킨그스턴 러셀에서 Sir John Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 6월 18일 영국 워스스터실르 스트렌샤에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1201: de 8 de janeiro de 1201 a 7 de janeiro de 1202
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Rohese de Bardolf nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Alicia Corbet, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Russell de 8 de janeiro de 1201 a 7 de janeiro de 1202, em Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de junho de 1246, em Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Rohese de Bardolf родилась около 1180 г. в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia Corbet, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Russell с 8 января 1201 по 7 января 1202 в местности кингстон расселл, дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 июня 1246 г. в местности стреншам, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.1201: desde 8 de enero de 1201 hasta 7 de enero de 1202
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Rohese de Bardolf nació aproximadamente 1180, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Bardolf Viscount of Bradewell, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Alicia Corbet, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir John Russell desde 8 de enero de 1201 hasta 7 de enero de 1202, en Kingston Russell, Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de junio de 1246, en Strensham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
